display_description.he: השוואת ספקי חשמל, תעריפי מים וגז וארנונה בין רשויות מקומיות בישראל
display_description.en: Compare electricity providers, water tariffs, natural gas rates, and arnona (municipal property tax) across Israeli municipalities and utility companies. Use when a user needs to understand IEC tariff structures, calculate solar panel ROI, compare tiered water pricing, or evaluate arnona differences between cities. Covers electricity market deregulation, independent power producers, Mekorot water pricing, and municipal rate variations. Do NOT use for commercial/industrial utility contracts, telecommunications comparisons, or utility infrastructure investment analysis.
